The '''''Mantan Wanderer''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] origin, operated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
Little is known for sure about the appearance or capabilities of the ''Mantan Wanderer'', except that the ship was designated as a [[Command ship/Legends|command cruiser]], and was capable of serving as the lead vessel of a line on detached duty.

It carried at least one [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] troops, [[Team 19]], and their [[Aegis-class Combat Shuttle|''Aegis''-class Shuttle]]. It is not clear whether the rest of the [[Company/Legends|company]] of troops assigned to the line were berthed aboard, nor is it not known what other transports or [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] the cruiser could deploy.

The ship had a single primary docking bay, with the command bridge sited some way forward of this. Directly ahead of the hangar was [[section Desh-32]], which served as the barracks of Team 19. Ahead and above of this was the main medical bay.

The droids aboard the ship were supervised by an overseer unit designated [[EV-2-E]].

==History==
The vessel was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Qarl]], and was designated as a [[Command ship/Legends|command cruiser]] of the [[14th Roving Line]], a unit of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

This line of Rebel warships was tasked with stirring up trouble in the frontier zone between the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Behind the scenes==
The term "Wanderer" is also a German word which means "hiker" or "wayfarer".
